_meta.note: Canonical manifest for the GLOBAL_Settings layout. Renderers read it: index.html (object/JSON inspector, annotated) and preview.html (real to-scale as-built render, now resolves theme tokens live from z-themes via resolve.js). Field bindings are PROPOSED (no table articulated yet) and will validate against schema/tables.json once it exists. Theme is LOCKED to the z-themes doc-set (maw-dark-utility). Inline token MIRROR removed in Phase 2 — tokens now resolve from z-themes by slug; this manifest carries only the reference.

layout.name: GLOBAL_Settings
layout.purpose: App-wide setup: session identity, preferences (theme, default account, budget month), value-list global seeds, and import/process state. The one screen where g_ globals live so they can be seen and set.

theme.name: MAW Dark Utility
theme.tokensNote: Tokens resolved live from the z-themes doc-set by slug (via z-themes/resolve.js). No inline token mirror — z-themes is the single source of truth. Changing the theme there reskins this layout with no re-render.

objects.label: Global Settings
objects.notes: Layout title. Static text object using the theme title token (30px / 600).

objects.label: Current User
objects.notes: Set on startup from Get(AccountName). Single-user, but drives the CreatedBy / ModifiedBy audit quad.

objects.label: App Version
objects.notes: Calc returning the solution version string. Display only.

objects.label: Environment
objects.notes: Pop-up menu bound to value list gLIST_Environment. Gates debug-only tooling.

objects.label: Debug Mode
objects.notes: 1/0 flag. Reveals developer buttons + verbose script logging.

objects.label: Theme
objects.notes: Default Dark. Drives conditional layout theming across the solution.

objects.label: Default Account
objects.notes: Stores an Account PrimaryKey; value list gLIST_Accounts shows names. Pre-selects the account for quick manual entry.

objects.label: Current Budget Month
objects.notes: First-of-month date the budgeting + report screens default to. Phase 3 relevant, seeded now.

objects.label: Today
objects.notes: Get(CurrentDate). Display anchor for the staleness nudges in DD-018.

objects.label: Account Types (seed)
objects.sample:
Checking
Savings
Credit Card
Cash
Loan
Receivable
Asset (feed-less)
objects.notes: Global feeding a 'use values from field' value list. Seeds the Account type taxonomy (DD-011 / DD-013).

objects.label: Transaction States
objects.notes: Seeds the cleared / pending reconciliation states (DD-021).

objects.label: Import In Progress
objects.notes: 1/0 guard set during CSV import to block re-entrancy (DD-012).

objects.label: Last Import Session
objects.notes: Points at the most recent ImportSessions record for a quick 'last import' readout.

objects.label: Reset Session Globals
objects.notes: Clears / reinitializes session g_ globals to defaults. Script proposed under scripts/utilities/.

objects.label: Toggle Theme
objects.notes: Flips g_ThemeMode Dark/Light and refreshes. Script proposed under scripts/utilities/.
